content: App Sandbox is MANDATORY for Mac App Store. com.apple.security.network.server = boolean, app may listen for incoming connections (needed to bind NWListener on 127.0.0.1:8787). com.apple.security.network.client = outbound (Last.fm HTTPS, artwork downloads). Loopback IS subject to sandbox network entitlements; with server+client entitlements a sandboxed app can run a local loopback WebSocket server. A separate browser process connecting inbound to 127.0.0.1 is fine (browser has its own network capability). Issues on loopback are typically firewall/code-signing, not sandbox (Apple DTS/Quinn).
